### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Projections](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Projections.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Projections')

## ProjectionEventDto Class

Wire\-format event DTO sent to domain services for projection building\.
Deliberately excludes Server\-internal fields \(CausationId, UserId, DomainServiceVersion,
GlobalPosition, MetadataVersion, Extensions, MessageId, AggregateId/Type/TenantId/Domain\)
to maintain the security boundary\.

```csharp
public record ProjectionEventDto : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Projections.ProjectionEventDto>
```

## ProjectionEventDto\(string, byte\[\], string, long, DateTimeOffset, string\) Constructor

Wire\-format event DTO sent to domain services for projection building\.
Deliberately excludes Server\-internal fields \(CausationId, UserId, DomainServiceVersion,
GlobalPosition, MetadataVersion, Extensions, MessageId, AggregateId/Type/TenantId/Domain\)
to maintain the security boundary\.
